A function to determine the status of a number as prime or composite can be constructed using modulus. * * *  
The function checks if a number is divisible by any integer other than 1 and itself. *  
The result is either "prime" or "composite" based on the modulus operation. * * *  
The function uses modulus to determine divisibility and returns the status. *  
The result is determined by checking for factors other than 1 and the number itself. * * *  
The function is concise and leverages the modulus operator for clarity. *  
The status is returned based on the divisibility of the input number. *  
The function is designed to be efficient and easy to understand. *  
The status is updated based on the modulus result of the number. *
